title: Cache Management
description: Managing the Composer download and metadata cache lifecycle

actors.name: FileDownloader
actors.description: Downloads package archives; reads/writes the files cache (cache-files-dir)

use_cases.name: Run Garbage Collection
steps: Same config resolution as UC1; skips top-level cache-dir (GC only on sub-dirs)
cache-files-dir → cache.gc(cache-files-ttl, cache-files-maxsize): deletes expired files, then LRU eviction until under maxSize
cache-repo-dir  → cache.gc(cache-ttl, 1GB): deletes expired metadata files
cache-vcs-dir   → cache.gcVcsCache(cache-ttl): removes old VCS directories (depth=0)
use_cases.result: Stale/oversized cache entries removed; self::$cacheCollected = true

use_cases.name: Read Package from Cache
use_cases.trigger: FileDownloader.download() — checks cache before HTTP fetch
steps: cache.copyTo(cacheKey, fileName): checks file_exists, touches mtime, filesystem.copy to target
If hit: skips HTTP download entirely
If miss: proceeds to HTTP download
use_cases.result: Package file served from cache (cache hit) or downloaded (cache miss)

use_cases.name: Write Package to Cache
use_cases.result: Downloaded archive stored in cache-files-dir for future reuse

use_cases.name: Cache Repository Metadata
use_cases.result: Package metadata JSON cached to avoid repeated HTTP calls

use_cases.name: Automatic Garbage Collection
steps: cache.gcIsNecessary(): returns !random_int(0,50); skips in test suite / completion process
use_cases.result: Background GC triggered automatically without developer intervention

use_cases.name: Check Cache Availability
steps: cache.isEnabled(): tries mkdir(root, 0777, true) if not exists; checks is_writable
Warns via IO if not writable; sets enabled=false
use_cases.result: Cache operations gated; graceful degradation if filesystem unavailable

include_relationships: UC1 includes UC8 (Clear All Caches includes Check Cache Availability)
UC2 includes UC8 (Run GC includes Check Cache Availability)
UC3 includes UC8 (Read from Cache includes Check Cache Availability)
UC4 includes UC8 (Write to Cache includes Check Cache Availability)
UC7 includes UC2 (Auto GC includes Run Garbage Collection logic)
extend_relationships: UC2 extends UC1 (--gc option changes clear to GC)
UC7 extends UC3 (auto-GC may trigger during download)

cache_directories.cache-vcs-dir: VCS checkouts; GC removes old directories by age
cache_directories.cache-repo-dir: Repository metadata JSON; GC by TTL + 1GB cap
cache_directories.cache-files-dir: Downloaded package archives; GC by cache-files-ttl + cache-files-maxsize
cache_directories.cache-dir: Top-level; only cleared by full clear, not GC

important_notes: Cache.clear() requires !readOnly; cache-read-only config flag propagates via setReadOnly()
gc() uses two-pass: first delete by TTL expiry (DateTime), then LRU eviction by access time until under maxSize
gcVcsCache() removes entire directories (depth=0) not individual files
File names sanitized with allowlist regex before filesystem ops to prevent path traversal
write() uses atomic rename via temp file (bin2hex random suffix .tmp) to avoid partial writes
static $cacheCollected prevents multiple GC runs per process
FileDownloader touches atime on copyTo() to update LRU order for future GC
